actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: The service corridor ahead is a kill lane, but its layout is wrong for defense.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Push through fast. If a terminal still answers, check why the shutters were chained inward.

SERVICE HUB
Emergency shutters failed in sequence from the archive end of the corridor.
Witnesses reported synchronized movement before first contact, as if something was herding them away from the vault.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: You made it through. The path deeper into the complex is open.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: These corridors were built to funnel breaches back toward the core. Move on the stronghold and find who broke the seal.
